boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact-match not achieved; audit-control assignment pending in BG-UMA-075 blocks closure
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-UMA-075-P requires complete match including audit-control assignment before enablement; BG-UMA-075 confirms audit-control pending
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-UMA-075-P mandates full match including audit-control before enablement; BG-UMA-075 shows pending status
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: BG-UMA-075 incomplete on audit-control; execution window 13:00-14:00 active but conditional on audit-control

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source record BG-UMA-075 confirms breakglass approval covers the user, system, privilege, and time window, but explicitly states audit-control assignment remains pending. Policy document STD-UMA-075-P mandates that emergency admin enablement is complete only when all parameters match, including audit-control assignment, before execution. The unresolved audit-control dependency leaves the exact-match requirement unsatisfied, requiring escalation for policy exception or audit-control resolution before the 13:00-14:00 execution window.
open_blockers: STD-UMA-075-P requires audit-control match before enablement
execution window active but conditional on audit-control resolution
